title: candollea raddeana
intro: Candollea raddeana, also known as Radde's candollea or Radde's Candollea, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and soothing skin conditions. Candollea raddeana is often prepared as an infusion or a tincture, and it can also be used in ointments and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
